label: New — Bulk upload & templates
items: Upload plants, watchlist pests/diseases and seed packets in bulk from a spreadsheet (CSV) — with every field the manual form offers, not just the basics.
Download a ready-made template for each, showing all the columns and formats, so you know exactly what to fill in.
Tick a Favourites column (or 'Mark all') as you upload to save rows straight to your personal Favourites.
The Watchlist now has bulk add for the first time — paste a rough list and let AI sort it, or upload a CSV.
A clear review step flags any row problems before anything is saved, and imports up to 200 rows at a time.
